column1: Shootout_heapsort,"opt failed for pass instcombine with exit code 1

LLVM ERROR: Instruction Combining on benchmark_heapsort did not reach a fixpoint after 1 iterations. Use 'instcombine<no-verify-fixpoint>' or function attribute 'instcombine-no-verify-fixpoint' to suppress this error.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/ and include the crash backtrace and instructions to reproduce the bug.
